svg.title: FailSafe Escalation To Output Signal Flow

g.text: FailSafe Escalation To Output Signal Flow
- timeoutClear or dead boundary -> gate reason 1/2
- fallback alert type when decision type is 0
1. Boundary or transport issue reaches CGW
2. CGW escalates effective alert and gate reason
3. IVI converts escalation into warning text / beep
4. CLU keeps the escalated warning visible to the driver
